productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Grey Trousers
description: Composition Grey trousers made of 100% cotton, with a flat front, two side pockets, one back pocket, zippered and buttoned closure, and loops on waist to hold a belt Fitting Comfort Wash care Pre-soak the garment before wash Preferably hand wash inside out with zippers and buttons fastened, using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not attempt to remove stains by spot washing Flat dry or drip dry on hanger and avoid wringing Preferably steam iron A famous saying goes - "A man's class is raised by a bar with the trousers he wears". The man of substance always chooses his formal trousers with much care, and united colors of benetton makes it all the more easier with its classy range of formal trousers. Designed with the choicest of fabrics to offer a comfortable, fresh feel, this trouser makes for a perfect daily office wear. Pair it with classic formal shirts and leather shoes to look every bit like the corporate that you are. Model statistics The model wears trousers of length 40 cm Height: 6.2', Waist: 32”
